title: Start a 1-Person AI Creative Agency with Higgsfield + Claude
summary: Liam Ottley demonstrates how to build a one-person AI creative agency using Higgsfield for image generation, Claude for automation and copywriting, Notion for client databases, and Apify for competitor scraping. The system produces product photography, UGC ads, commercials, and ad copy while automatically tracking performance and competitor data.
writeup: Liam Ottley walks through building a one-person AI creative agency from four tools: Higgsfield for image generation, Claude for automation and copywriting, Notion for client databases, and Apify for competitor scraping. The assembled system produces product photography, UGC ads, commercials, and ad copy, then tracks performance and competitor data automatically. The takeaway is a concrete stack and workflow where generation, copy, client records, and competitive monitoring are wired together rather than handled as separate manual tasks.
